testcase.name: test_stats_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:34: in test_stats_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Sessione non valida"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stats_returns_stats_dict

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'stats' key assert 'stats' in {'detail': 'Sessione non valida'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:40: in test_stats_returns_stats_dict assert "stats" in data, "Response should contain 'stats' key" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'stats' key E assert 'stats' in {'detail': 'Sessione non valida'}

testcase.name: test_stats_returns_total_count

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'total' key assert 'total' in {'detail': 'Sessione non valida'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:47: in test_stats_returns_total_count assert "total" in data, "Response should contain 'total' key" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'total' key E assert 'total' in {'detail': 'Sessione non valida'}

testcase.name: test_stats_contains_expected_collections

failure.message: AssertionError: Collection 'commesse' should be in stats assert 'commesse' in {}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:63: in test_stats_contains_expected_collections assert coll in stats, f"Collection '{coll}' should be in stats" E AssertionError: Collection 'commesse' should be in stats E assert 'commesse' in {}

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected attachment in Content-Disposition: assert 'attachment' in ''

testcase.name: test_export_filename_format

failure.message: AssertionError: Filename should contain 'backup_normafacile_': assert 'backup_normafacile_' in ''

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:115: in test_export_filename_format assert "backup_normafacile_" in content_disposition, f"Filename should contain 'backup_normafacile_': {content_disposition}" E AssertionError: Filename should contain 'backup_normafacile_': E assert 'backup_normafacile_' in ''
